2605.07804.title: Prune-OPD: Efficient and Reliable On-Policy Distillation for Long-Horizon Reasoning
2605.07804.paper_summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) leverages dense teacher rewards to enhance reasoning models. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon tasks exposes a critical flaw: as the student's generated prefix inevitably diverges from the teacher's thought process, the teacher's dense reward loses local exploitability. Continuing to generate and evaluate tokens on these ``drifted'' trajectories not only degrades reward quality but also incurs massive computational waste. To address this, we introduce \textbf{Prune-OPD}, a framework that dynamically aligns training budgets with supervision quality. By continuously monitoring the local compatibility between student and teacher predictions (e.g., via top-$k$ overlap), Prune-OPD detects prefix-drift events in real time. Upon detecting severe drift, it monotonically down-weights subsequent unreliable rewards and triggers dynamic rollout truncation. This allows the training process to halt futile generation and reallocate compute strictly to reliable teacher supervision. Across diverse teacher-student combinations, Prune-OPD consistently aligns computation with supervision reliability. When prefix drift makes dense teacher rewards unreliable, it reduces training time by 37.6\%--68.0\% while preserving, and often improving, performance on challenging benchmarks (AMC, AIME, HMMT). When student-teacher compatibility remains high, it automatically preserves long-context supervision by expanding the training window. These results suggest that Prune-OPD improves OPD not by blindly shortening rollouts, but by reallocating computation toward locally exploitable teacher rewards.
2605.07804.paper_summary_zh: 在政策蒸餾（OPD）中，利用密集的教師獎勵來增強推理模型。<lb/>然而，將 OPD 擴展到長期任務暴露出一個關鍵缺陷：隨著學生生成的前綴不可避免地與教師的思維過程發散，教師的密集獎勵失去了局部可利用性。<lb/>繼續在這些“漂移”軌跡上生成和評估標記不僅會降低獎勵質量，還會造成巨大的計算浪費。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們引入了 \textbf{Prune-OPD}，這是一個動態調整訓練預算與監督質量的框架。<lb/>通過持續監測學生和教師預測之間的局部相容性（例如，通過 top-$k$ 重疊），Prune-OPD 實時檢測前綴漂移事件。<lb/>在檢測到嚴重漂移後，它單調地降低隨後不可靠獎勵的權重並觸發動態回滾截斷。<lb/>這使得訓練過程能夠停止無意義的生成，並將計算資源嚴格重新分配給可靠的教師監督。<lb/>在多種教師-學生組合中，Prune-OPD 始終將計算與監督可靠性對齊。<lb/>當前綴漂移使得密集的教師獎勵變得不可靠時，它將訓練時間減少了 37.6\%--68.0\%，同時保持，並且通常改善在挑戰性基準（AMC、AIME、HMMT）上的表現。<lb/>當學生-教師相容性保持高時，它自動通過擴展訓練窗口來保留長上下文監督。<lb/>這些結果表明，Prune-OPD 改善了 OPD，不是盲目縮短回滾，而是將計算重新分配到局部可利用的教師獎勵上。
2605.07804.author: Zhicheng Yang et.al.
2605.07804.authors: Zhicheng Yang, Zhijiang Guo, Yifan Song, Minrui Xu, Yongxin Wang, Yiwei Wang, Xiaodan Liang, Jing Tang
